title: IKEA India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: IKEA India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at IKEA India are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IKEA India:
IKEA India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India!
